AcquisitionReturns.description:
Headline returns for an acquisition (computed from its persisted pro forma + the standard
promote). All null until a pro forma is computed. Output-only — used in the detail header and
the pipeline list for at-a-glance comparison.
AcquisitionReturns.title: AcquisitionReturns

AcquisitionUpdate.description:
PATCH /acquisitions/{id} — edit underwriting-level acquisition fields. All optional;
only provided fields are applied. Extend as more editable fields land (PR 3/4).
AcquisitionUpdate.title: AcquisitionUpdate

BudgetGroup.description:
A roll-up subtotal for a chart group / sub-group / section header, mirroring the source's
"Total - {code} - {name}" rows. Computed server-side by the pure ``roll_up_tree`` so the Budget
tab renders the numbers without re-deriving any math. Present for every group that has at least
one budget row beneath it.
BudgetGroup.title: BudgetGroup

BudgetLineCreate.description: Add a row: a canonical GL (account_code) or a custom line (custom_label + section).
BudgetLineCreate.title: BudgetLineCreate

BudgetLinePatch.description:
Edit a line's prior and/or year-one amount (by line_id, or by account_code for a
not-yet-seeded GL row). Year-one edits flip the line to a human override.
BudgetLinePatch.title: BudgetLinePatch

BudgetLineRef.description:
A reference to one budget row for reordering: its stored ``line_id``, or an un-seeded GL
``account_code`` (materialized on reorder).
BudgetLineRef.title: BudgetLineRef

BudgetReorder.description:
Set the display order of a section's rows (drag-to-reorder): the rows in their new
top-to-bottom order. Presentational only — the NOI roll-up is section-based.
BudgetReorder.title: BudgetReorder

BudgetRow.description:
One grid line: a canonical GL or a custom line, with an editable prior-year and year-one
amount + provenance for each column.
BudgetRow.title: BudgetRow

CompDiscoverResult.description:
POST /acquisitions/{id}/comps/discover — the acquisition is geocoded synchronously (so the
map updates immediately and address errors surface now), then discovery runs in the worker.
CompDiscoverResult.title: CompDiscoverResult

CompManualAdd.description: POST /acquisitions/{id}/comps — manual add by URL or direct fields.
CompManualAdd.title: CompManualAdd

CompVisualization.description: Rate×sentiment / rate×amenities scatter + ranked list for the Comps tab.
CompVisualization.title: CompVisualization

DefaultRulePatch.description: Edit a rule's tunables (the type + target GL are structural and not editable here).
DefaultRulePatch.title: DefaultRulePatch

DefaultRuleRow.description: One rule in the editable library.
DefaultRuleRow.title: DefaultRuleRow

DispatchRequest.description: POST /feedback/{id}/dispatch — package brief → GitHub issue w/ @claude.
DispatchRequest.title: DispatchRequest

FeedbackCommentCreate.description: POST /feedback/{id}/comments — enrichment builds the dispatch brief.
FeedbackCommentCreate.title: FeedbackCommentCreate

FeedbackCreate.description: POST /feedback — the user types only a short description; context is attached.
FeedbackCreate.title: FeedbackCreate

FinancialPeriodVersion.description:
A dated, retained financials upload. The active one (is_current) feeds the GL view;
older versions stay queryable (append-never-overwrite).
FinancialPeriodVersion.title: FinancialPeriodVersion

GlAccountOption.description:
A canonical GL account for the mapping picker and the Budget tab hierarchy
(GET /gl-accounts). ``parent_code`` + ``sort`` let the client rebuild the section → group →
sub-group → detail tree; ``is_contra`` / ``tier`` drive sign display and the rare toggle.
GlAccountOption.title: GlAccountOption

LaborPositionRow.description: One planned position with its computed weeks + cash wages (work campers draw $0 cash).
LaborPositionRow.title: LaborPositionRow

LaborSeedRequest.description: Optional OM staffing to seed the roster from; empty → the default scenario.
LaborSeedRequest.title: LaborSeedRequest

MappingConfirm.description: Human accepts a mapping → writes a learned mapping (§5.3.5).
MappingConfirm.title: MappingConfirm

MappingSplit.description: Split one seller line across multiple GLs (parts must sum to the line's amount).
MappingSplit.title: MappingSplit

MappingSplitPart.description: One destination of a split: a slice of the seller line's amount mapped to a GL.
MappingSplitPart.title: MappingSplitPart

OmProposal.description: AI-proposed acquisition from an offering memorandum, for human review (§5.2).
OmProposal.title: OmProposal

OmStaffingRole.description: A staffing line proposed from the OM (seeds the Labor roster, tagged 'from OM').
OmStaffingRole.title: OmStaffingRole

OperatingDoc.description:
The Operating Inputs panel: the unit groups + headcount + electric, with derived driver
totals and the needs-input flags that gate the dependent defaults.
OperatingDoc.title: OperatingDoc

OperatingPatch.description:
Edit the electric driver (flips its source to manual). Headcount is NOT editable here — it's
the Labor roster total (single source of truth).
OperatingPatch.title: OperatingPatch

PopulationRingOverride.description: PATCH /acquisitions/{id}/population-rings — override one ring (records author + note).
PopulationRingOverride.title: PopulationRingOverride

ProformaInputs.description:
GET/PUT /acquisitions/{id}/proforma-inputs — the canonical per-acquisition assumptions the
pro forma, 60-month cash flow, and promote waterfall all read from. All optional; the pro forma
is computed once the required ones (revenue, opex, exit cap, LTV, rate, amort term, hold) plus a
purchase price are present. Percentages are decimals; null canonical-store fields fall back
(loan_amount → price × ltv; revenue/expense_growth → noi_growth; coinvest/fees → defaults).
ProformaInputs.title: ProformaInputs

ProformaInputsOut.description:
Response shape for GET /proforma-inputs. A distinct (output-only) class so FastAPI emits
one stable component name instead of splitting the shared model into -Input/-Output.
ProformaInputsOut.title: ProformaInputsOut

ProformaMonth.description: One month of the levered cash flow (month 1..hold_years×12).
ProformaMonth.title: ProformaMonth

ProformaMonthlyResults.description:
GET /acquisitions/{id}/proforma-monthly — the 60-month grid (empty until a pro forma is
computed). Each 12-month block rolls up to the matching ProformaResults year.
ProformaMonthlyResults.title: ProformaMonthlyResults

StaffingRoleIn.description: One OM-proposed staffing line passed to the roster seed.
StaffingRoleIn.title: StaffingRoleIn

UnderwritingDefaults.description:
Global pro-forma defaults that seed each acquisition's inputs. PUT body (all optional); the
GET response (UnderwritingDefaultsOut) returns effective values (built-ins fill any nulls).
UnderwritingDefaults.title: UnderwritingDefaults

UnderwritingDefaultsOut.description: GET response — distinct (output-only) name avoids the -Input/-Output schema split.
UnderwritingDefaultsOut.title: UnderwritingDefaultsOut

UnitGroupCreate.description: Add a unit group — a default category or a custom sub-type.
UnitGroupCreate.title: UnitGroupCreate

UnitGroupPatch.description: Edit a unit group's count / billable flag / label (flips its source to manual).
UnitGroupPatch.title: UnitGroupPatch

UnitGroupRow.description: One unit grouping in the capture grid.
UnitGroupRow.title: UnitGroupRow

WaterfallTiersUpdate.description:
PUT /acquisitions/{id}/waterfall-tiers — the per-acquisition promote tiers. ``hurdles[i]`` is
the tier's IRR hurdle, ``promotes[i]`` the GP/RJourney promote share (LP = 1 − promote).
Replaces all tiers for the acquisition; the promote then reads them instead of the defaults.
WaterfallTiersUpdate.title: WaterfallTiersUpdate

info.description: API surface per design doc §9. Phase-0 endpoints are typed contract stubs; domain logic lands in Phases 1–4.
info.title: RJourney Acquisitions Platform API

get.description:
Pipeline list, filterable by phase/status (newest first). Excludes archived deals unless
``archived=true`` (the archived view).

post.description:
Manual acquisition create. When an address/geocode is present, population rings
(25/50/100/150 mi) are auto-pulled for the Initial UW market view (§5.5).

Extract a proposed acquisition from an offering-memorandum PDF for human review (§5.2).

Returns a *proposal* only — nothing is persisted. The operator reviews/edits it and then
creates the acquisition (AI proposes, a person accepts — CLAUDE.md). Gated on the AI key
(admin DB override → env), so an admin can fix the key in Settings with no restart.

get.description:
Full assembled §8.3 document. Financials/pro forma/comps/gates fill in as their
backends land; today this returns the acquisition metadata and the market (population) block.

patch.description:
Edit underwriting-level acquisition fields (e.g. the negotiated purchase price that flows
downstream). Only fields present in the body are applied; the rest are untouched.

post.description:
Archive a deal: move it out of the active pipeline (soft-delete). Never hard-deletes — it
stays fully recoverable via restore. ``status`` is preserved. Idempotent.

patch.description: Override an assumption (records author + note) and recalculate.

get.description:
The two-column prior-year / year-one grid: each line's prior actuals (editable, defaults to
the mapped P&L) beside the editable year-one projection, with provenance + the NOI roll-up.

post.description: Re-run the defaults engine against the current drivers (manual lines untouched).

patch.description: Edit a line's prior and/or year-one amount.

post.description: Add a row — a canonical GL or a custom (flagged) line item.

delete.description: Remove a row (custom → deleted; GL → dropped from year-one, prior kept).

post.description: Clear a manual edit and re-link the line to its default rule (recompute from drivers).

Lock the budget (gated on zero placeholders + zero unmapped lines), then roll it up to the
stabilized NOI and recompute the pro forma / returns.

Set the display order of budget rows within a section (drag-to-reorder). Presentational
only — allowed on a locked budget; the NOI roll-up is section-based and unaffected.
Prefill annual rows from the mapped prior-year actuals + the defaults engine (idempotent).
Re-open a locked budget for editing; pro forma reverts to the bridge until re-lock.

get.description: Comp set + visualization data (rate×sentiment / rate×amenities).

post.description: Manual competitor add by URL or direct fields → scrape/enrich.

Find competitors within 50 miles of the acquisition's (OM) address. Geocodes synchronously
so the map updates immediately and an unlocatable address fails fast; the radius search itself
runs in the worker (geocode + one or more source APIs is a burst of external HTTP).
Upload a source document → parse + normalized load (§5.2).

schema.title: Response Upload Document Acquisitions  Acquisition Id  Documents Post

get.description:
Dated upload versions of the acquisition's financials (newest first). The current one
feeds the
GL/mapping view; older versions are retained and selectable.

schema.title: Response List Financial Periods Acquisitions  Acquisition Id  Financial Periods Get

post.description: Make an earlier upload the current version (human-in-the-loop; nothing is deleted).

schema.title: Response Activate Financial Period Acquisitions  Acquisition Id  Financial Periods  Period Id  Activate Post

get.description:
The deal's staffing plan: positions + the rolled-up labor totals (feeds the budget Wages
cluster) and prior-year labor from the mapped P&L.

post.description: Add a position to the plan.

delete.description: Remove a position from the plan.

post.description: Seed the roster — from OM staffing if provided, else the default scenario (idempotent).

get.description: Mapping queue for human review (proposals + candidate shortlist).

post.description:
Human accepts a mapping → writes a learned mapping for reuse (§5.3.5), scoped to the
acquisition's seller so re-uploads from the same seller resolve without the LLM.
Split one seller line across multiple GLs; the parts must sum to the line's amount.

get.description:
The Operating Inputs panel: unit groups + headcount + electric, with driver totals and the
'needs input' flags that gate the dependent defaults.

patch.description: Edit the headcount and/or electric driver (flips the edited field to manual).

post.description: Seed the panel from the OM unit mix + the mapped prior-year Electric (idempotent).

patch.description: Edit a unit group's count / billable / label (flips it to manual).

post.description: Add a unit group — a default category or a custom sub-type.

delete.description: Remove a unit group (drivers recompute from the rest).

patch.description: Advance/kill a acquisition — gated; never auto-advances (human-in-the-loop).

get.description: Population rings (25/50/100/150 mi) for the acquisition's market view (§5.5).

patch.description: Override one ring's population (records author + note; baseline retained).

post.description: Re-pull baseline ring populations from the provider (overrides preserved).

get.description: Pro forma results.

The acquisition's editable pro-forma assumptions (debt terms, growth, exit, stabilized
revenue/opex). Empty until set.

The 60-month monthly cash-flow grid. Each 12-month block rolls up to the matching pro-forma
year; empty until a pro forma is computed.

post.description: Restore an archived deal back into the pipeline (status unchanged). Idempotent.

get.description:
Headline returns (going-in cap, loan/LTV, Partner/RJourney/Deal-Level IRR & MOIC, promote
value) computed from the persisted pro forma + the standard promote. Empty until computed.

The acquisition's persisted promote tiers (hurdle rate + GP promote share per tier). Empty
until set — the promote then uses the configured defaults.

schema.title: Response Get Waterfall Tiers Acquisitions  Acquisition Id  Waterfall Tiers Get

put.description: Replace the acquisition's promote tiers; the headline returns reflect them immediately.

schema.title: Response Put Waterfall Tiers Acquisitions  Acquisition Id  Waterfall Tiers Put

get.description: Configured/missing status for every managed integration key (never the value).

schema.title: Response List Integrations Admin Integrations Get

delete.description: Remove an admin override so the environment value applies again.

put.description: Set/replace an integration key (encrypted at rest; takes effect immediately).

post.description: Exchange an OIDC code for a session (Entra ID / external). TODO(decision: §14 C-16).

get.description: The global defaults rule library (seeded from RULE_LIBRARY on first read).

put.description:
Edit a rule's rate/amount, enabled flag, basis, recommended band, or override behavior —
globally. The change takes effect on the next budget recompute (manual lines untouched).

get.description: Triage queue, filterable by type/status/priority.

post.description: Widget submit; context (route/role/version/breadcrumbs/errors) auto-captured.
Attach a screenshot/file (access-scoped storage; never logged — D-32).

schema.title: Response Add Feedback Attachment Feedback  Feedback Id  Attachments Post

post.description: Enrichment comment — builds the dispatch brief.
Package brief → create a GitHub issue mentioning @claude (§5.12). No auto-merge.

get.description: Active gate-question config, optionally filtered by phase.

schema.title: Response List Gate Questions Gate Questions Get

get.description: The canonical GL chart (active accounts) for the mapping picker / remap.

schema.title: Response List Gl Accounts Gl Accounts Get

post.description: Run the per-acquisition promote waterfall and return both positions + the breakdown.

schema.title: Response List Question Suggestions Question Suggestions Get

post.description: Anyone may suggest a gate-question add/retire/edit.

patch.description: Admin approves/declines a suggestion (only admin approves).

get.description:
The effective global pro-forma defaults (admin-set values, else built-in best-guess).
Any authenticated user reads these to pre-fill a new acquisition's pro forma.

put.description: Admin: set the global pro-forma defaults (only provided fields); returns effective set.

post.description:
Inbound acquisition mail → create a acquisition in initial_uw + queue parse (§5.1).

TODO(decision: §14 C-18): Graph mailbox vs. inbound-parse provider; verify signature.

schema.title: Response Email Intake Webhooks Email Intake Post

post.description: Sync issue/PR state back to feedback_dispatch (§5.12.4). Verify HMAC signature.

schema.title: Response Github Webhook Webhooks Github Post
